fields.tagline: Keep trucks loaded. Keep drivers paid. Keep freight on time.

fields.title: Truck Dispatching
fields.description: We find high-paying loads that align with your preferred routes and schedule. We handle rate confirmations, PODs, invoicing, and all paperwork — so you focus on driving.
fields.icon: <svg class="w-8 h-8" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M9 17a2 2 0 11-4 0 2 2 0 014 0zM19 17a2 2 0 11-4 0 2 2 0 014 0z"></path><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M13 16V6a1 1 0 00-1-1H4a1 1 0 00-1 1v10a1 1 0 001 1h1m8-1a1 1 0 01-1 1H9m4-1V8a1 1 0 011-1h2.586a1 1 0 01.707.293l3.414 3.414a1 1 0 01.293.707V16a1 1 0 01-1 1h-1m-6-1a1 1 0 001 1h1M5 17a2 2 0 104 0m-4 0a2 2 0 114 0m6 0a2 2 0 104 0m-4 0a2 2 0 114 0"></path></svg>

fields.title: Amazon Relay Loads
fields.description: Specialized in high-volume Amazon Relay freight across the Eastern US corridor. Consistent loads, minimal deadhead miles, and predictable earnings.
fields.icon: <svg class="w-8 h-8" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M20 7l-8-4-8 4m16 0l-8 4m8-4v10l-8 4m0-10L4 7m8 4v10M4 7v10l8 4"></path></svg>

fields.title: Trucking Accounting
fields.description: Specialized trucking accounting to maximize tax benefits and keep your finances clean. Transparent weekly settlements with zero holdbacks.
fields.icon: <svg class="w-8 h-8" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2" d="M9 7h6m0 10v-3m-3 3h.01M9 17h.01M9 14h.01M12 14h.01M15 11h.01M12 11h.01M9 11h.01M7 21h10a2 2 0 002-2V5a2 2 0 00-2-2H7a2 2 0 00-2 2v14a2 2 0 002 2z"></path></svg>

fields.title: Fleet Optimization
fields.description: Strategic guidance for owner-operators and small fleets to reduce costs, improve operational efficiency, and grow their trucking business.
